title: A Lady in Love
writer: Harriet Ford, Caroline Duer, Alice Eyton
actors: Ethel Clayton, Harrison Ford, Boyd Irwin
plot: After Barbara Martin, a naïve young convent girl, elopes with her guardian's degenerate brother, Barton Sedgewick, she discovers that Barton already has a wife and child. Barton then deserts both wives, leaving Barbara to turn to ...
